channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Price predictions 4/13: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin and altcoin charts highlight growing strength across the industry. Will geopolitics and US economic health concerns stand in the way of the rally?

item.title: Bitcoin erases weekend decline, returns to $73,400 as oil retreats back under $100
item.description: Risk assets shrugged off the failed weekend negotiations between the U.S. and Iran, and the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Kraken won‘t negotiate after extortion attempt with client data
item.description: The exchange’s head of security said there had been two incidents involving “inappropriate access” to client data, involving about 2,000 user accounts.

item.title: Coinbase VP of international policy leaves for OpenAI
item.description: Tom Duff Gordon exited to join OpenAI as head of EMEA Policy, a spokesperson for Coinbase said.

item.title: Crypto wallet firm Exodus sues W3C and its CEO Garth Howat, seeking to compel $175M acquisition
item.description: A lawsuit in the Delaware Court of Chancery seeks to compel Howat to comply with obligations under the November 24, 2025 Stock Purchase Agreement.

item.title: Bitcoin's struggle to build long-lasting uptrend remain: Here’s why
item.description: Bitcoin’s attempts to hold rallies above the $70,000 to $75,000 range continue as ETF demand limps along, US treasury yields rise and traders take profit as BTC price hits overhead resistance.

item.title: White House crypto adviser Witt says other Clarity Act hurdles being cleared
item.description: Patrick Witt told CoinDesk that a recent compromise on stablecoin yield should hold as the Senate tries to advance its crypto bill, even as bankers continue warnings.

item.title: Dormant Bitcoin wallets are the biggest quantum risk: Here is why
item.description: Not all Bitcoin faces the same level of risk from quantum computing. Dormant wallets with exposed public keys could be the first targets.

item.title: Polymarket Trader Turns $500 Into $252K After UFC Makes Yet Another Scoring Error
item.description: A Polymarket trader walked away with $252,000 in profits after taking advantage of the UFC’s latest “scoring error.”

item.title: 'We Will Not Pay These Criminals': Crypto Exchange Kraken Is Being Extorted Over Stolen Data
item.description: Crypto exchange Kraken says it's being extorted over stolen customer data, but won't yield to the criminals or negotiate.

item.title: Bitcoin shorts above $70K at risk since ‘90% of downside’ is already complete
item.description: Bitcoin price data suggests BTC remains undervalued and that short positions opened above $70,000 face a high risk of liquidation.

item.title: Anthropic Claude Mythos: Serious Threat or Overhyped? AI Security Institute Weighs In
item.description: Claude Mythos could be a potentially massive cybersecurity threat, according to early testing from the UK’s AI Safety Institute.

item.title: Forget the Dead-Eyed Cartoon—Meta Is Building a Photorealistic AI Clone of Zuckerberg
item.description: Three years after his Horizon Worlds avatar became a global meme, Zuckerberg is back at the avatar game, this time with a realistic AI clone.

item.title: Jito, KODA team up on institutional staking in South Korea
item.description: The collaboration aims to bring regulated custody and staking for JitoSOL to South Korea as institutions prepare for new crypto rules.

item.title: JUST IN: It's now estimated that Michael Saylor's Strategy has purchased 6,487 BTC today via STRC 👀 This is wild! 🤯 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9oNnpkeVRIbUdTYzltYXdKLUpXOVVsdjc3cno1WTE0NXp1SGsyRV9rUUpINFZ6TFh0VFNMY25BVHdZeTFyZ2x1Z2tnQ2VSdU5IS0dFekR2R2t4ekNjS3cxOUo5TlNHSU0?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: It's now estimated…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC staff outlines conditions for crypto trading apps and wallets to avoid broker-dealer registration. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9oSGd4aWx6RUctZTBRbnRVVkQ3b3ZKSVhmX3VnRVp3aHF5aGdUenNFVVMwaFd3WDJVLV9nVTRib09OSzdTaEhSdGx2dlZYX1dPRTZ0eHVRejlab2RnM1J0eHBR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC staff outlines c…

item.title: U.S. SEC says software allowing crypto wallet transactions not considered broker
item.description: The latest crypto view from the securities agency concludes software that clears the way for securities transactions with individual wallets won't trip regulations.

item.title: Crypto-aligned super PAC begins to endorse candidates for US midterms
item.description: The Fellowship PAC reported spending $300,000 on advertising for a Republican running to represent Georgia's 14th Congressional District in 2026.

item.title: Surging Bitcoin, Ethereum ETF Investments Drive Crypto Funds to Best Week Since January
item.description: Institutional crypto investors posted their strongest weekly inflows since January, with Bitcoin and Ethereum demand rising as XRP investments cool.

item.title: Justin Sun Bashes Trump Family's World Liberty, Claims Investors Used as 'Personal ATM'
item.description: Tron founder Justin Sun, a major investor in the Trump-backed World Liberty Financial, lashed out at the company over the weekend.

item.title: Bitcoin bounces to $72.5K as markets react to US Strait of Hormuz blockade
item.description: Bitcoin rallied to $72,500 as US stocks reacted to US efforts to blockade the Strait of Hormuz. Despite the rebound, BTC traders warned that a price correction remains a risk.

item.title: Crypto Hacker Mints $1.1 Billion in Polkadot via Ethereum Bridge, But Can Only Cash Out $237K
item.description: A hacker exploited a Polkadot bridge, minting $1.1 billion worth of DOT tokens before making a tiny fraction of that tally by selling it.

item.title: Crypto exchange Kraken targeted in extortion attempt but says there was no breach and no client funds at risk
item.description: The firm said a criminal group is attempting to extort it over limited insider-related data access incidents affecting about 2,000 accounts. Kraken says it will not pay and is working with law enforcement.

item.title: I think when we removed the crypto bots, there were only 2000 people rugging each other back and forth, forever - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBVcE5ic1BhTUpPMm16YTVQMzZiSFJwMi1uYlhGb3dsVkY4STFtd25yRTAxM3hCb1g3N01NSXpRQnotUlU3MmJVc3NjbWU0ajh3TW5IZG1RMVhQS2hDRk85Yg?oc=5" target="_blank">I think when we removed the crypto b…

item.title: Circle CEO says he won’t freeze USDC without a court order even as hackers walk away with millions
item.description: Circle defends its hands-off approach to freezing funds as critics point to hundreds of millions in losses tied to delayed action.

item.title: Bankers rebuff White House claim that stablecoin yield doesn't threaten deposits
item.description: A new study from the American Bankers Association says the White House economists went after the wrong premise in their recent look at the issue.

item.title: 🚨🗞️NEW: Giancarlo Leaves Law Firm to Focus on Crypto and AI Former CFTC Chair @giancarloMKTS announces @WillkieFarr departure; the Senate returns with the Clarity Act in the spotlight; and @patrickjwitt responds to @ABABankers take on the CEA r - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFA1eWlxYzVwMFFkOVA3Q1p0WlA2cUtCZjI2UmU3dDZFUjBJbnVFOVVPSWZxTFZKd01WRk5jTnRNWTc3ckJqR0x3bF9JMmVzbTFIaXNTMmRfeERIemxKb2Y1SnlzcmRNZw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨🗞️NEW: Giancarlo Leaves L…

item.title: Foundry Launches Zcash Mining Pool Alongside Industry-Leading Bitcoin Pool
item.description: The world's largest Bitcoin mining pool operator expands into the privacy-focused Zcash token with rapid network adoption.

item.title: Bitcoin moves off lowest levels as worst of weekend fears slip away
item.description: As the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz goes into effect, reports say Iran is considering the abandonment of uranium enrichment as a way to end the war.

item.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Makes Biggest Ethereum Buy Since December
item.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies' Ethereum treasury gained another $157 million of ETH last week, its biggest acquisition since December.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Morning Minute: Relentless Sellers, War Volatility Keep Bitcoin Down
item.description: Bitcoin fell over the weekend as Iran negotiations failed and sell pressure persists, while Morgan Stanley signaled growing crypto ambitions.

item.title: ECB backs tokenized EU capital markets with strict guardrails
item.description: The European Central Bank said tokenization could improve EU capital markets, but only with central bank money, interoperable infrastructure and resilient regulation.

item.title: ClearBank secures MiCA approval, targets Circle euro, dollar stablecoins for institutional clients
item.description: The U.K.- and EU-regulated credit institution gains crypto-asset service provider status and said it will connect clients to regulated stablecoin rails over Circle Mint

item.title: Bernstein says Bitcoin market already priced in quantum risk
item.description: Bernstein says Bitcoin’s selloff already reflects quantum risk and that developers still have time to agree on a post-quantum upgrade path.

item.title: Strategy's Bitcoin Stockpile Nears BlackRock's ETF Holdings After $1 Billion BTC Buy
item.description: Following its latest Bitcoin purchase, Strategy only needs 9,000 BTC at present to surpass BlackRock’s industry-leading investment vehicle.

item.title: SEC Clarifies Certain DeFi UIs Can Operate Without Broker-Dealer Registration The SEC’s Division of Trading and Markets said certain crypto trading interfaces, including DeFi front-ends, wallet extensions, and mobile apps, may operate without broker-dealer - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFB3cEg2anlJa01tZUt3RW9HTThlN1BOSkNDN3hMTlg4cG1pWkxGdC01NjhvRnl6VTA0QkViQ2ZEVFpxOC1YRWJvNEhmQTRoRTdLeFMtUmFRLV85NWt1Rnoza2F6WQ?oc=5" target="_blank">SEC Clarifies Certain DeFi UIs C…

item.title: Nearly $120 million of XRP just moved to Coinbase in whale transaction
item.description: XRP is flat over the past 24 hours, but down more than 60% from its summer 2025 peak.

item.title: Bitmine's Tom Lee calls ether 'the wartime store of value' as holdings hit 4.87 million tokens
item.description: The company now holds 4.04% of all ether in existence and currently earns $212 million in annualized revenue from staking.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index falls 2.9% as all constituents trade lower
item.description: Polkadot (DOT) declined 11.5% and Cardano (ADA) dropped 6.8%, leading the index lower over the weekend.

item.title: Strategy buys 13,927 Bitcoin for $1B, holdings near 800,000 BTC
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy acquired 13,927 Bitcoin for $1 billion last week, funding the purchase through STRC share sales, lifting the company’s holdings to 780,897 BTC.

item.title: Foundry unveils Zcash block explorer as mining pool reaches 30% of hashrate
item.description: The mining pool comes alongside the unveiling of Zcashinfo.com, a block explorer with real-time network and mining data.

item.title: Binance co-CEO Richard Teng on the next era of crypto - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiUkFVX3lxTFBIQkVhWm8tZzNmNm0zVlIxR1NEaUd3NHpmQjV1NmxFWUwxSUNVcTZIUUhlcGNacXFGYnlNWW1NSU9XT0Q1TnlWWU1TR3gzZ2h6OEE?oc=5" target="_blank">Binance co-CEO Richard Teng on the next era of crypto</…

item.title: World Liberty Financial executes a massive $22 million stablecoin shuffle amid its borrowing controversy
item.description: The mint and a simultaneous $3 million burn come days after the venture said it had repaid $25 million of the borrowing position that left depositors unable to withdraw from a DeFi lending pool.

item.title: StarkWare cuts staff in push toward revenue-generating products
item.description: StarkWare CEO Eli Ben-Sasson said the company will split into two units as it adopts a faster and leaner “startup mode.”

item.title: Nigel Farage-backed Stack BTC adds $2.7M in Bitcoin to treasury
item.description: Nigel Farage-backed Stack BTC bought $2.7 million of Bitcoin, deepening the Reform UK leader’s crypto ties as the UK moves to curb crypto donations.

item.title: Strategy buys 13,927 bitcoin for $1 billion, entirely through STRC
item.description: Last week's purchases were completely funded by sales of Stretch, the companies perpetual preferred stock.

item.title: BREAKING: Michael Saylor's 'Strategy' buys 13,927 Bitcoin worth $1 billion. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAzNml0c1MzM1E2UHc1UGotLW9Hay1YNFgtTW5OdnZOVHpfWFYyeWd1ckRBaUE0MGdjUHBPcWExMG9GY0YyYjNkUk5yUHVWbi1oTmQwaWJoQVBrdF9HQ2pfRHl3?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Michael Saylor's 'Strate…

item.title: Strategy has acquired 13,927 BTC for ~$1.00 billion at ~$71,902 per bitcoin and has achieved BTC Yield of 5.6% YTD 2026. As of 4/12/2026, we hodl 780,897 $BTC acquired for ~$59.02 billion at ~$75,577 per bitcoin. $MSTR $STRC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE42b3B3ZFBzaUsxZFFEMkItOWxtX0oxU1l1WktpSU9kU21OY0NGaXdJa2FQTjlmd1BpWWI1alJjdnRaaENwMWFaVDkxSnlrbDlMVEpNTmZtMVoxaFU?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy has acquired 13,927 BTC for ~$1.00…

item.title: BITCOIN WEAKENS AS US–IRAN TALKS COLLAPSE Bitcoin remains under pressure after U.S.–Iran peace talks failed. Donald Trump announced a blockade on vessels tied to Iranian ports, raising fears of disruption at a key energy chokepoint. Analysts say r - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBjU21lU3QtZTh2eThmQV9JdkFIME1kN1NOSVBRcWRfWVJCb2YtQXdRRmpzdVhEeFZNbkoxNkV4QnNuNlJjYkMyajM3c1JmTEUtNEFWZkFPMWxXbjVqZWc?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN WEAKENS AS US–IRAN TALKS COLLAP…

item.title: South Korea says API crypto trading now makes up 30% of market: Report
item.description: South Korea’s FSS said API trading now makes up 30% of crypto turnover and warned it will crack down on abusive automated trading patterns, local media reported Monday.

item.title: Another solid week for the bitcoin ETFs, they are now officially positive in YTD flows. Wasn’t a huge hole but they dug out of it like bosses despite an upwardly challenged price. #BoomerStrong - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE55TGlid1JIQVR6RVAtM1VSTzRMSlBtNk9yeDQtd1VWRHV1by1HWjZRaFl3VWJzb0ZERHpQaHBrbUFYdGxDMEdiZUhQX2k2eXNMUU5Pako1cXNxUnMzQTY0VkJiN3A?oc=5" target="_blank">Another solid week for the bitc…

item.title: AI agents are set to power crypto payments, but a hidden flaw could expose wallets
item.description: Researchers say a largely invisible layer of AI infrastructure can intercept sensitive data and has already been linked to stolen credentials and a $500,000 wallet drain

item.title: Bitcoin anchors near $70,000 as RAVE's 3,400% surge signals speculative froth
item.description: Bitcoin and major cryptocurrencies remain relatively resilient. Surges in some smaller tokens showed there's still froth left in the market.

item.title: Crypto ETPs see $1.1B inflows, strongest gains since January
item.description: Crypto ETPs recorded $1.1 billion in inflows last week, led by Bitcoin and US spot ETFs, as easing US inflation data and geopolitical tensions supported demand.

item.title: Justin Sun presses WLFI to identify wallets behind freeze powers
item.description: Sun urged the Trump-linked WLFI platform to disclose who controls the multi-sig and smart contract behind the platform, days after its governance token hit a new low.

item.title: Crypto markets stall as oil surges past $100 on Strait of Hormuz blockade
item.description: Bitcoin and ether retreated Monday as tensions in the Middle East triggered a spike in crude oil, forcing traders into defensive derivatives positioning.

item.title: Bank of Korea calls for stock-style circuit breakers on BTC exchanges
item.description: Crypto's 24/7 global trading across hundreds of venues makes it difficult for any single country to halt the market.

item.title: Hyperbridge attacker mints 1B bridged Polkadot tokens in $237K exploit
item.description: A Hyperbridge exploit let an attacker mint 1 billion bridged Polkadot tokens on Ethereum and cash out about $237,000, reviving debate over bridge security.

item.title: Oil price surges 8% on Iran tensions: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin preserved $70,000 at the weekly close as markets began reacting to a breakdown in US-Iran negotiations and blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
